message:
fix: parse extends/compose/advice/presets/squash/gate TOML sections in formula parser (gt-1fje)

The formula parser was silently discarding TOML sections that had no
corresponding struct fields: extends, compose, advice, pointcuts,
presets, squash, and gate (on steps). This meant composition formulas,
aspect-oriented formulas, and squash/gate configurations were parsed
but their data was thrown away.

Added struct types and fields for all missing sections:
- Extends, Compose (with ComposeExpand) for formula composition
- Advice, AdviceAround, AdviceStep, Pointcut for AOP features
- Squash for completion behavior configuration
- Gate on Step for conditional step execution
- Preset for configurable leg selection

Updated validation to allow:
- Workflow formulas with extends but no local steps
- Aspect formulas that define advice (providers) without aspects array

Removed integration test skip workarounds for shiny-enterprise,
shiny-secure, and security-audit formulas.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
